modules.title: Claude Ecosystem & Flows
modules.description: Anatomy of Claude, token mechanics, stateful orchestration loops, and message routing topologies.

videos.title: Architecture Overview
videos.script: Claude API anatomy covering Messages API, streaming, and tool use. Overview of token mechanics including context window management, caching strategies, and rate limits. Architecture diagram walkthrough showing request flow from user prompt to response.
cues: Overlay: Streaming vs batch response comparison

videos.title: Stateful Orchestration
videos.script: Deep dive into loops vs stateless middleware boundaries. Multi-agent routing patterns with practical examples. Security guards and router classifiers that prevent infinite loops and malicious inputs.
cues: Highlight: Loop detection with depth counter

videos.title: Production Wiring
videos.script: Connecting Claude to enterprise data sources securely. Environment configuration for API keys, VPC setup, and IAM roles. Monitoring, logging, and error handling best practices for production deployments.

modules.title: Model Context Protocol (MCP)
modules.description: Connecting Claude to secure private databridges (SQLite/PostgreSQL) with read-only boundaries and stdio/SSE transports on Fly.io.

videos.title: MCP Fundamentals
videos.script: What is the Model Context Protocol? Protocol architecture and design principles. Client-server model explained: stdio vs SSE transports. Tool definitions and how resources are exposed to Claude.

videos.title: Building an MCP Server
videos.script: Step-by-step implementation of an SQLite data bridge. PostgreSQL read-only query layer for enterprise data access. Deploying to Fly.io with fly.toml configuration and environment secrets.

videos.title: Enterprise MCP
videos.script: Authentication and authorization boundaries for production MCP. Multi-server orchestration with message routing. Monitoring MCP traffic and latency with dashboards.

modules.title: Zero-Data Retention (ZDR)
modules.description: Restricting API endpoints using AWS Bedrock VPC Interface Endpoints (PrivateLink) and implementing strict compliance logs.

videos.title: ZDR Principles
videos.script: Why zero-data retention matters for enterprise compliance. AWS Bedrock architecture overview with VPC integration. PrivateLink and VPC Endpoints explained with network diagrams.

videos.title: Implementing ZDR
videos.script: Terraform blueprint for VPC Interface Endpoints configuration. Restricting API endpoint access with security groups. Compliance logging and audit trail implementation.

videos.title: ZDR in Production
videos.script: Testing and verifying data retention boundaries with penetration tests. Incident response procedures for data leaks. Compliance certification walkthrough for SOC 2 and HIPAA.

modules.title: Deterministic Routers
modules.description: Building specialized agent classifiers and execution circuit-breakers in Python to shut down rogue loops cleanly.

videos.title: Router Architecture
videos.script: Why deterministic routing matters for AI safety. Agent classifier design patterns and decision trees. Comparison of rule-based vs ML-based routing approaches.
cues: Highlight: Decision tree vs ML classifier

videos.title: Building the Router
videos.script: Python implementation walkthrough of router.py. Loop detection algorithm with depth counting. Circuit breaker pattern implementation with configurable thresholds.

videos.title: Router in Production
videos.script: Load testing results and performance benchmarks. Edge case handling: malformed input, recursion attacks, and timeout management. Integration patterns with MCP and caching layers.

modules.title: Financial Engineering
modules.description: Minimizing enterprise operational overhead by up to 90% using explicit, prefix-matching prompt cache points.

videos.title: Cost Optimization Fundamentals
videos.script: Understanding Claude pricing: input vs output token costs. Prompt caching mechanics and prefix matching explained. Cost modeling techniques for enterprise workloads.
cues: Highlight: Input vs output cost ratio

videos.title: Implementing Caching
videos.script: Explicit cache point placement strategies for maximum hit rate. Cache hit ratio optimization techniques. Python implementation with cache_layer.py covering LRU and TTL strategies.

videos.title: Enterprise ROI
videos.script: Real-world cost reduction case study showing 90% savings. Monitoring cache performance with dashboards. Scaling optimization across multiple enterprise workloads and teams.

exam.title: Certification Exam & Case Study
exam.description: The final exam covers all 5 modules with a hands-on case study.
scenarios: Diagnosing a production outage scenario with recursive loops
Implementing ZDR compliance under time pressure
Building and deploying an MCP server from scratch
Optimizing prompt caching for a given workload
